fields.helpText: This file is used to keep track of the counters for creating code sheets and batch numbers.  The entry into this field is in the form 'station number'-'code sheet system identifier (3 characters)'-'fiscal year'. For example 460-VOL-89 indicates station number 460, code sheet system identifier VOL, and fiscal year 89.
Stores the actual counter number.  Increments by one for each code sheet or batch number.
